title: Nagadevathe
desc: Naganna, a worshipper of the snake goddess, vows celibacy in her honour, but is seduced by a dancer. But when he dies from a snake bite, his brother starts to despise the deity.

title: Bandhu Balaga
desc: Subramanya, a son of a wealthy man, strives to help the needy. However, chaos ensues when his father interferes with his work.

title: Sirivantha
desc: Narayana Murthy wages a courageous battle to withstand all pressures and fight against corruption to retain the values he has cherished.

title: Pakkadmane Hudugi
desc: Balu, a 26-year-old bachelor, falls in love with his neighbour's daughter, Indu. He decides to woo her with the help of his music composer friend, Chakravarthy.

title: Pakkadmane Hudugi
desc: Balu, a 26-year-old bachelor, falls in love with his neighbour's daughter, Indu. He decides to woo her with the help of his music composer friend, Chakravarthy.

title: Shiva Shakthi
desc: Parvati prepares herself to depart with Lord Shiva after their wedding ceremony. Meanwhile, Mainadevi becomes emotional and bursts into tears as she bids farewell to Parvati. Can Parvati console her before she departs?

title: Prayanikara Gamanakke
desc: A bus ferrying a motley of passengers gets hijacked en route to Hyderabad. Later, the police and passengers face multiple challenges to overcome the situation.

title: Shiva Shakthi
desc: Lord Shiva's anger flares when Shambuki and Diti insult Goddess Parvati for her infertility and reject her blessings. Will the Goddess be able to soothe the furious Lord's temper?

title: Shiva Shakthi
desc: Parvati joins Lord Shiva on a pilgrimage to Amarnath, seeking blessings for a child. However, their journey is threatened by Tarakasura's malevolent scheme, as he sends Rahu and Ketu to obstruct them.

title: Sirivantha
desc: Narayana Murthy wages a courageous battle to withstand all pressures and fight against corruption to retain the values he has cherished.

title: Chitta Chora
desc: A modern-day Robin Hood steals money from the rich to help the poor. Trouble ensues when his theft results in the kidnapping of a corrupt minister's daughter.

title: Kshetrapati
desc: After his father's suicide and witnessing the struggles of many farmers, Basav embarks on a revolutionary path in search of justice. Along the way, he takes on powerful figures, the system, and the government.

title: Thavarige Baa Thangi
desc: Lakshmi faces trouble when her in-laws hurl a false accusation at her. However, Lakshmi's brother is determined to stand by her side.

title: Rowdy
desc: Anna rules over Rayalaseema with a good heart. However, when a project threatens the well-being of his people, he does everything he can to oppose it and angers dangerous people as a result.
